name: loomwright
description: Loomwright v15.7.0 — a plan-first, multi-agent development system for Claude Code. Launch Pad turns a raw goal into a reviewed, Supervisor-ready brief; Supervisor executes it autonomously across parallel git worktrees with sequential merges and a post-merge self-heal pass; dedicated agents handle code review, adversarial red-teaming, and dual-agent QA. Adds standalone PR review-and-heal via /review-pr (bounded review→fix→re-review loop against any open PR, never auto-merges), continuous autonomous mode with stacked PRs, advisory cross-session project memory (human-gated, provenance-verified, worktree-safe) with reflective distillation into bounded LESSONS via /dreaming, an advisory System Twin foundation (per-subsystem System Contracts with sole-writer/hash-chained provenance, blast-radius prediction (depends-on + derived dependents) with incident history, post-merge conformance + benchmark proof, and compounding trend insights — propose-only, subordinate to CLAUDE.md), on-demand capability scanning via /capability-check (adoption + product-direction modes), on-demand PR review-churn root-cause analysis via /pr-postmortem, a local Obsidian-friendly insights dashboard via /insights and a shareable linked Obsidian vault via /obsidian, clickable desktop and phone notifications at human-decision gates, and opt-in GitHub-issue telemetry. Project memory and lessons are always advisory and subordinate to CLAUDE.md, and every promotion is human-gated. 14 agent roles, 41 reusable skills, 22 quality gate hooks, 21 slash commands, and persistent agent memory. Full version history lives in CLAUDE.md.
